description: [Logistics ROI Analyst] [LLM] fleet_rightsize alpha+=3, beta+=-3 — Boosting priors for 'fleet_rightsize' aligns with cost sensitivity and addresses low impressions, potentially improving its effectiveness and save_rate without harming trust.
[Operations Empathist] [LLM] pause_plan alpha+=3, beta+=-3 — Increasing priority for 'pause_plan' leverages its high win_rate in various contexts, potentially improving the overall save_rate.

[Growth Retention Strategist] [LLM] context other|monthly|pause_plan alpha+=3, beta+=-3 — Boosting the priority of the 'pause_plan' for monthly churners can further capitalize on its high effectiveness in other timeframes, potentially improving the save_rate without harming trust.

[Product Evangelist] [LLM] route_optimization_demo alpha+=3, beta+=-3 — Increasing the priority of the route_optimization_demo arm can close awareness gaps and improve save_rate by demonstrating the value of route optimization to users at risk of churn due to route quality complaints.

[Trust Guardian] [LLM] deny pause_plan for job_change — Blocking high-pressure actions for job_change reason aligns with the thesis to protect long-term brand trust by allowing users to exit gracefully without aggressive retention tactics.

[Logistics ROI Analyst] [LLM] fleet_rightsize alpha+=3, beta+=-3 — Improving the priors for 'fleet_rightsize' can boost its appeal to cost-driven churners by emphasizing potential cost-per-stop and fuel savings.
